nodes.label: AI as time-saving content creation tool
nodes.grounding_span: AI can draft a really good blog post in just a minute or two. It takes me much longer.

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner requiring refinement
nodes.grounding_span: collab for sure even if I delegate a full task like 'draft a blog post about X', I'm still going to look for ways to improve it.

nodes.label: AI alignment with company values and context
nodes.label_negative: AI output misaligned with company values
nodes.grounding_span: remember that our company values humane practices

nodes.label: AI as replacement for freelance writing skills
nodes.label_negative: Human writing skills as irreplaceable asset
nodes.grounding_span: AI has already largely replaced my field (freelance content creation). Why pay someone when you can get a chat model to draft similar content for free in less time?

nodes.label: AI as tool for crisis recovery under time pressure
nodes.grounding_span: What probably would have taken me days to fix was done in a matter of hours through AI's assistance.

nodes.label: Time efficiency and productivity
nodes.grounding_span: the need to save time and put that energy elsewhere led me to AI

nodes.label: Quality content aligned with business identity
nodes.grounding_span: that doesn't really fit our company, try again

nodes.label: Professional skill maintenance and adaptation
nodes.grounding_span: I work to maintain my writing skills (typically through creative means)

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for rapid website recovery
nodes.grounding_span: What probably would have taken me days to fix was done in a matter of hours through AI's assistance.

nodes.label: Acceptance of AI replacing freelance writing but valuing own skills
nodes.grounding_span: AI has already largely replaced my field (freelance content creation). However, the ability to write and understand will never stop being valuable.

nodes.label: Optimistic expectation of future AI requiring no refinement
nodes.grounding_span: in the future I likely won't even need a back and forth conversation- it will just produce something that needs no improvements.

nodes.label: Iterative refinement through back-and-forth collaboration
nodes.grounding_span: From there, I'll take the content/suggestions and work with AI to improve it.

nodes.label: Contextual priming before task delegation
nodes.grounding_span: If it's a new model that's unfamiliar with me or my husband's business, I explain what we do, our core principles, and a bit about our company
